samplePrompts.title: Prompt Example
samplePrompts.description: Ask a science question and get an answer:
samplePrompts.prompt: Why does water expand when it freezes?

samplePrompts.title: Image Generation Example
samplePrompts.description: Create a fantastic image from a detailed prompt:
samplePrompts.prompt: A close-up photo of a hummingbird hovering to get nectar from a red rose with drops of dew. Iridescent blue and green feathers, wings a blur. Depth of field. High Dynamic Range.

samplePrompts.title: Image Editing Example
samplePrompts.description: Edit a photo by describing what to change. An image is already given:

samplePrompts.title: Sketch to Photo Example
samplePrompts.description: Turn a sketch into a photo by describing the scene:
samplePrompts.prompt: Photo of a modern apartment building, tropical resort, sunset view

samplePrompts.title: Video Generation Example
samplePrompts.description: Create a short video from a text description.
samplePrompts.prompt: A golden retriever running through a field of sunflowers on a sunny day
